title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Savills India

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Savills India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Savills India in Gurgaon offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Savills India:
Savills India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Savills India!
